## Meeting Purpose

[Discussing Matteo Tittarelli joining Marcel Santilli's AI-powered content creation business as a fractional strategist.](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's business is rapidly growing, closing new clients frequently](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Matteo has extensive experience as a growth operator and is interested in joining to learn AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [They discuss a potential fractional arrangement where Matteo gets paid $1k per client workstream he manages](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Matteo is open to going all-in if the business hits certain milestones](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [There is potential to build a creator/partner program to drive further distribution](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Topics

### Business Growth and Pipeline

  - [Marcel's business is one contract away from $100k MRR](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [They have 8 active clients, 10 workstreams, 11 in pipeline, 2 in proposals](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Rapidly closing new logos through webinars, referrals, and Marcel's sales efforts](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)

### Matteo's Background and Interest

  - [Matteo made \~$113k in Q2 from his consulting clients](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Interested in joining to learn AI workflows and the "growth operator" role](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Sees potential to scale the model across many clients with low marginal effort](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

### Proposed Fractional Arrangement

  - [Matteo would start managing 1 workstream for $1k/month](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Opportunity to take on more as he ramps up](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)
  - [10% referral fees if he brings in new business](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Flexible approach to see if it's a good fit before going all-in](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)

### Building a Creator/Partner Program

  - [Discussed creating a program to train others on the AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
  - [Certify them as partners who can then market the services](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [Potential for strong distribution leveraging the "growth operator" brand](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to create fwd.digital email and add Matteo to Notion, Slack](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
  - [Matteo to provide details for contracting/payment setup](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
  - [Discuss with Jimmy (who runs engagements) to understand his role](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Attend or watch recording of Marcel's workshop to learn the processes](https://fathom.video/share/7VCVa1H-U8uJcsD3RXxTPvF1vDHKJ55Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
